roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT ATC MOTION TO RELEASE SUBPOENAED RECORDS FILED

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 10-12-21/987,2/ORMS/X: NO WEAPONS AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 08-25-21/DAWF/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:1/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
